title: Stipulation Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating stipulation configurations

stipulation_id.description: Unique identifier for the stipulation in format 'category:version'

stipulation_version.description: Semantic version of the stipulation policy

exposure_policy.description: Policy for how the API can be exposed

proxy_prefix_format.description: URL template for proxy prefix with placeholders

requires_scope_parameter.description: Whether the API requires scope parameters in the proxy URL

forbid_methods.description: HTTP methods to strip from the contract

required_fields.description: Required fields that must be present in the OpenAPI contract

inject_metadata.description: Whether to inject metadata block into exposed contracts

metadata_block.description: Metadata to inject into exposed contracts

catalog_default_visible.description: Whether the contract is visible in public catalog by default

extension_namespace.description: OpenAPI extension namespace for metadata injection

enforce_version_alignment.description: Whether to enforce alignment between API major and contract versions
